visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a person's hands frantically shaking a thick stack of red New Taiwan Dollar banknotes towards the camera. The individual is wearing a green long-sleeved sweatshirt, a brown wooden beaded bracelet on the right wrist, and a black smartwatch on the left. The lighting is bright and even, focusing on the motion of the money. (2) The scene cuts to a medium shot of a middle-aged male character wearing a grey flat cap, glasses, and a green Roots brand sweatshirt standing in a room with white walls. He holds a single 100-dollar bill and gestures while speaking. A young girl in a colorful floral shirt briefly appears in the background near a wooden table. (3) The camera angle shifts to a top-down view of a dark wooden table where multiple banknotes are scattered. A green sticky-hand toy is seen being flung onto the table to grab the money. Action transitions through fast cuts showing the sticky hand successfully lifting bills. (4) The main character reappears in a medium shot, pointing at the lens with a smile. A large colorful graphic of a cartoon cat riding a green snake appears in the center. The background remains a clean, minimalist indoor setting with soft overhead lighting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 這裡!!. [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. (2) [Variety]: 都拿去!!. (3) [Subtitle]: 新年無聊. (4) [Subtitle]: 教大家玩一個小遊戲. (5) [Subtitle]: 先準備一個 100 塊. (6) [Subtitle]: 放在這裡. (7) [Variety]: +100. (8) [Variety]: ROUND 2. (9) [Subtitle]: 誰黏到就是誰的!!. (10) [Slogan]: 祝大家蛇年行大運!. (11) [Slogan]: 新年快樂. (12) [Subtitle]: 然後我要講什麼?.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 young girl, and 1 pair of legs of an additional adult visible in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man with short hair, wearing a grey flat cap, rectangular glasses, a dark green Roots sweatshirt with a beaver logo, and a brown beaded bracelet.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean residential indoor environment featuring a large dark wooden dining or work table and plain white walls. The floor is a light-colored wood laminate.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy, fast-paced electronic pop track. A male voice shouts '這裡!!' with extreme enthusiasm, followed immediately by the sound of rapid paper rustling from the money shaking. Background laughter and high-pitched cheers from children are heard, creating a festive atmosphere. (2) A transition occurs marked by a short comedic 'whoosh' sound effect. The male speaker shifts to a lower-arousal narrative tone, explaining a game. A distinct 'thud' is heard as he places the money on the wooden table. The background music remains upbeat and consistent. (3) A deep, processed male voice announces 'ROUND 2' like a video game announcement. This is followed by a series of sharp 'pop' and 'snap' sound effects each time the sticky toy hits the table. Children's screams of excitement and cheering swell in the mix. (4) The final phase features a triumphant music swell as the man gives a loud New Year greeting. He then asks a question in a more natural, questioning tone with lower volume, while the 'slap' of the sticky toy continues periodically until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Demonstration -> Call to Action -> Outtake
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a fun and simple New Year's game using money and a sticky-hand toy, aiming to entertain families during the holiday period while offering greetings.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media short-form editing with variety-show style text and sound effects to maintain high engagement.
